mapper.select: select dir_id, parent_dir_id, name, null as data_type, null as data_id from byai_space_dir a where a.dir_type in ('WEB_SEARCH') and a.session_id = #{sessionId} and a.create_by = #{createBy} union all select c.file_id as dir_id, a.dir_id as parent_dir_id, c.file_name as name, b.data_type, b.data_id from byai_space_dir a join byai_space_dir_rel b on a.dir_id = b.dir_id join byai_files c on b.data_id = c.file_id where a.dir_type = 'IMPORT' and a.session_id = #{sessionId} and a.create_by = #{createBy} union all select d.doc_archive_id as dir_id, a.dir_id as parent_dir_id, d.title as name, b.data_type, b.data_id from byai_space_dir a join byai_space_dir_rel b on a.dir_id = b.dir_id join byai_web_crawl_request c on b.data_id = c.request_id join byai_web_crawl_archive_doc d on c.request_id = d.request_id where a.dir_type = 'WEB_SEARCH' and a.session_id = #{sessionId} and a.create_by = #{createBy}

select dir_id, parent_dir_id, name, null as data_type, null as data_id from byai_space_dir a where a.dir_type in ('COLLECT') and a.create_by = #{createBy} union all select c.id as dir_id, a.dir_id as parent_dir_id, c.name as name, b.data_type, b.data_id from byai_space_dir a join byai_space_dir_rel b on a.dir_id = b.dir_id join byai_showcase c on b.data_id = c.id where a.dir_type in ('COLLECT') and a.create_by = #{createBy}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO byai_space_dir ( dir_id, parent_dir_id, name, dir_type, sort, description, create_by, create_time, update_time, session_id ) VALUES
( #{item.dirId}, #{item.parentDirId}, #{item.name}, #{item.dirType}, #{item.sort}, #{item.description}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.sessionId} )
mapper.select:
select a.resource_id as dir_id, a.parent_resource_id as parent_dir_id, a.resource_name as name, 'RESOURCE' as data_type, a.resource_id as data_id from ss_resource a
(a.resource_id in
#{id}
or a.parent_resource_id in
#{id} )

select a.resource_id as dir_id, a.parent_resource_id as parent_dir_id, a.resource_name as name, 'RESOURCE' as data_type, a.resource_id as data_id, a.resource_source_pk_id as dataset_id from ss_resource a
a.resource_status in (2) and a.resource_biz_type in ('KG_DOC', 'KG_QA', 'KG_TERM')
and a.create_by = #{createBy}
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

select a.resource_id as dir_id, a.parent_resource_id as parent_dir_id, a.resource_name as name, 'RESOURCE' as data_type, a.resource_id as data_id, a.resource_source_pk_id as dataset_id from ss_resource a left join ( select grant_obj_id, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'RED' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as red_count, sum(case when grant_to_type = 'BLACK' and status_cd = 'A' then 1 else 0 end) as black_count from au_privilege_grant where grant_type in ('AVAILABLE_USE', 'FORCE_USE') and grant_obj_type in ('KG_DOC', 'KG_QA', 'KG_TERM') and status_cd = 'A'
or ( grant_to_obj_type = 'ORG' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{orgId}
)
or ( grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userId} )
or ( grant_to_obj_type = 'POST' and grant_to_obj_id in
#{positionId}
)
or ( grant_to_obj_type = 'STATION' and grant_to_obj_id = #{userStationId} )
group by grant_obj_id ) k on a.resource_id = k.grant_obj_id
a.resource_status = 2 and a.resource_biz_type in ('KG_DOC', 'KG_QA', 'KG_TERM')
and (k.black_count = 0 or k.black_count is null)
and (k.red_count > 0 and a.create_by != #{userId})
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by a.create_time desc, a.update_time desc
